positive: Minimalist graphic design illustration of a cosmic forest scene. Giant, bioluminescent stylized trees with smooth, abstract forms, casting ethereal blue and purple light onto a dark, starry landscape. The foreground features a serene crescent moon and stylized constellations made of glowing nebula dust. High contrast silhouette style, vector-art aesthetic, ultra-detailed linework, clean lines, symmetrical composition, deep cosmic navy blue and vibrant electric cyan color palette. Perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, grainy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, photo, signature, logo, trademark, anime, 3d render
